posts.text:
Once again,Texas leads the nation. 

Texas bans intoxicating hemp flower effective March 31 kxan.com/news/texas-politics…

Lame CYA move by the new “pro-sanctuary,” anti-ICE governor of Virginia.  Her party and Soros prosecutors are still refusing to honor ICE detainers.  Americans dead as a result.


Governor Abigail Spanberger (@GovernorVA)

Virginians deserve to know how a man who was convicted on terrorism charges and spent time in federal prison could carry out the horrific attack at Old Dominion University.

As a former intelligence officer, I have serious concerns. A full FBI investigation is vitally importan

Iran using AI to control global narrative as regime can't win on the battlefield, former security chief warns. 

Bridget Bean says Iran is manipulating images and videos after failing militarily. 

foxnews.com/media/iran-using…

STRAIT OF HORMUZ: Trump says allied nations may send warships with the U.S. to keep the critical waterway open after Iran’s attempted disruption. One way or another, he says, the Strait will remain OPEN, SAFE, and FREE! 
foxnews.com/live-news/us-ira…

Democrats can’t bring themselves to admit the obvious: destroying Iran’s nuclear sites and missile depots makes America safer. Instead, they keep rooting for Trump to fail.

Video

After Fairfax County HS tried to downplay string of hallway gropings, attacker is exposed as ADULT illegal alien. Spanberger’s sanctuary policies now shielding him from deportation. dailymail.co.uk/news/article…

“If you have TERROR ties, you should be denaturalized.”

Gene Hamilton says the U.S. must move faster to strip citizenship from individuals who obtained it fraudulently.

“The paper-based immigration system allowed people to lie and conceal information that nobody ever followed up on.”

Video

“California’s parole board still finds pedophiles ‘SUITABLE’ for release.”

Anne Marie Schubert: “These are pedophiles who still admit they’re sexually attracted to children — and the parole board is making every effort to let them out.”

Video

“Iran is trying to win through AI.”

Bridget Bean warns the regime is pushing manipulated content to shape the global narrative.

“They can’t win on the battlefield, so they’re trying to weaken our resolve with AI-manipulated images and videos.”

Video

“Iran’s radical theocracy has held the world HOSTAGE.”

Rep. @chiproytx says the strike on Karj Island targets the regime’s economic lifeline.

“The president is taking the right steps to free the world from that stranglehold and allow commerce and shipping to move through the straits again.”

Video
If you’re not watching this you should be.  She’s schooling the press corps, and it’s fantastic!

The mass exodus will come.


Bloomberg (@business)

Zohran Mamdani is proposing to raise NY's estate tax to 50% and have it kick in at $750,000 instead of more than $7 million bloomberg.com/news/articles/…




— https://nitter.net/business/status/2032500544330232175#m
Virginia Democrats Close To Making Gun Owners’ Worst Nightmare Reality – IJR ijr.com/virginia-democrats-c…

“Iran is using the Strait of Hormuz as a pressure LEVER.”

Mike Sarraille says Tehran’s strategy relies on proxies and disruption tactics.

“They still have drones and mines, but with persistence we can eliminate the IRGC boats and coastal defenses and reopen the strait.”

Video

“Iran’s nuclear program exists because of CHINA.”

@GordonGChang says Beijing played a central role in enabling Tehran’s nuclear ambitions.

“There have been direct transfers of materials and technology from China to Iran. The United States needs to start calling China out for that proliferation.”

Video

“Democrats care more about DEFUNDING ICE than securing the border.”

@SenEricSchmitt says voters see through what he calls political games driven by Trump Derangement Syndrome.

“They let 15 million people into this country — including violent criminals and terrorists — and now they’re trying to defund the Department of Homeland Security.”

Video
Laura: Democrats Won’t Admit Trump Made America Safer
Rep. Chip Roy: “Iran’s radical theocracy has held the world HOSTAGE.”
Mike Sarraille: “Iran is using the Strait of Hormuz as a pressure LEVER.”
Gordon Chang: “Iran’s nuclear program exists because of CHINA.”
Sen. Eric Schmitt: “Democrats care more about DEFUNDING ICE than securing the border.”
Kevin Donegan: “Iran’s pressure tactics are acts of TERRORISM.”
Gordon Chang: “President Trump should not go to BEIJING.”
Dan Bongino: “Lone actors worry me more than sleeper cells.”
Stefano Ritondale: “A CONVICTED ISIS sympathizer was still free.”
Morgan Wright: “The laws SHOULD change for convicted terrorists.”
